at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data

Class NodeFactory

  • java.lang.Object
    • at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.NodeFactory

  • public class NodeFactory
extends Object
    A factory to create TermNodes, Hedges and atomic types ( TermAtoms).
    Author:
    Alexander Baumgartner
